data.title: Don Gato introduces his tequila in FL with events on Jan. 29- first-ever bottle signing at ABC Fine Wine & Spirits, appearance at MLW Battle Riot VIII.
data.description: A popular cat enthusiast luchador, Don Gato, is set to make his debut in Florida. He will be participating in his first-ever bottle signing event at ABC Fine Wine & Spirits and making a special appearance at MLW Battle Riot VIII in Orlando. This event is scheduled to take place on January 21, 2026. Don Gato is known for being undefeated in the ring and for his strong affection for felines, gaining significant attention.

data.title: Iran's Central Bank converted $507M to Tether’s USDT stablecoin, aiding rial and global transactions.
data.description: Iran's central bank has sold off all the previously flagged USDT in its possession, utilizing the funds to bolster the rial currency and facilitate global transactions. The bank no longer retains any of the flagged USDT tokens in reserves.

data.title: Ryan is ranked #1 on Glassdoor's Best Places to Work list in Consulting, Finance, and Insurance for 2026. Ginny Kissling is pleased with the team's recognition.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Ryan, a prominent tax services and software provider, has secured the top spot as the best place to work on Glassdoor’s 18th annual Employees’ Choice Awards for 2026 in the consulting, finance, and insurance sectors. This recognition is especially meaningful as it stems from feedback from team members, according to Ginny B. Kissling, President Americas and Chief Operating Officer at Ryan. The acknowledgment signifies the efforts made to prioritize employee satisfaction and well-being within the company.

data.title: Anythink Libraries reopens Perl Mack location on Jan. 26, 2026 with new look, expanded hours, and 5,000 new books.
data.description: In Thornton, Colorado, Anythink Libraries in Adams County is set to reopen its Perl Mack branch on January 26, 2026. The renovated location will boast a modern appearance, extended operating hours, and an additional 5,000 books to its collection. The refurbishment features new carpeting, paint, and furniture, aligning with Anythink Libraries' dedication to delivering inclusive, inviting, and lively library spaces that cater to the local community. The injection of nearly 5,000 new books will enhance the library's offerings for visitors.

data.title: Club Travelzoo announces new Club Offers for UK members: £387 per person for Sicily trip with flights.
data.description: Travelzoo, a travel club catering to enthusiasts, has revealed a selection of new Club Offers for its UK members. Among the offerings are packages like "Sicily in the Spring, with Flights" which is priced at £387 per person. The company rigorously vetted and negotiated these deals, ensuring quality and value for its members. This announcement was made on January 21, 2026, without specifying its source. Travelzoo operates under the stock symbol NASDAQ: TZOO.

data.title: Navigating the world of travel rewards is simplified with program updates and tools, making point accumulation easier.
data.description: Recent enhancements to the program include updated features and new navigation tools, aiding travelers in navigating the complex world of points. These updates aim to streamline the process and provide users with a more user-friendly experience. The improvements come as the number of points continues to grow, with over X amount of points available for travelers to utilize.

data.title: LED materials market to reach $12.5 billion by 2033 with 7.1% CAGR, driven by energy-efficient lighting in various sectors.
data.description: The LED materials market is witnessing strong growth due to the increasing acceptance of energy-efficient lighting solutions in residential, commercial, and industrial sectors. The demand is being propelled by the growing need for sustainable infrastructure and strict energy regulations. The market is expected to continue its expansion with key players forecasted to benefit from this trend.

data.title: Global Pet Tech Market to reach USD 80.46 Billion by 2032 at 24.7% CAGR, as pet owners embrace smart devices and health monitoring tools.
data.description: The Pet Tech Market is experiencing rapid growth on a global scale as more pet owners are integrating smart devices, health monitoring tools, and digital platforms into their pets' care routines. Factors driving this market include a rise in pet humanization, increased disposable incomes, and a growing focus on pet wellness. This trend is reflected in the market's significant increase in recent years, with the industry estimated to be worth billions of dollars. Despite these positive developments, challenges still exist...

data.title: ACI Learning Tech Academy and Holy Cross College offer co-branded IT & cybersecurity certificates, enhancing career readiness.
data.description: In Notre Dame, Indiana, on January 21, 2026, ACI Learning Tech Academy announced a new partnership with Holy Cross College to introduce a program offering co-branded certificates of completion. This partnership aims to merge Holy Cross College's academic reputation with Tech Academy's practical, results-oriented IT training. This collaboration will provide students with valuable industry insights and expertise, combining academic excellence with hands-on learning.

data.title: Kyndryl partners with Nova Intelligence for AI-powered SAP modernization approach. Collaboration announced in NY on Jan 21, 2026. (Character count: 114)
data.description: Kyndryl is working with Nova Intelligence to introduce the Clean Field approach, enhancing customer support during SAP transformations. The collaboration was announced in New York on Jan. 21, 2026. Kyndryl, listed on NYSE as KD, specializes in critical enterprise technology solutions.

data.title: Bitcoin price aims for $95,000 by February, RSI at 44.66. Institutional targets at $165K-$200K year-end, facing $92,680 resistance in consolidation.
data.description: The current Relative Strength Index (RSI) for Bitcoin stands at 44.66, indicating a neutral stance. Institutional analysts have set ambitious price targets for Bitcoin, ranging between $165,000 and $200,000 by the end of the year. However, in the short term, Bitcoin is encountering strong resistance at $92,680 as it goes through a consolidation phase. Investors are keeping a close eye on these key levels as Bitcoin's price dynamics continue to evolve.

data.title: Treasury bond auction for RIKB 28 1115 and RIKS 37 0115 with ISIN numbers on auction date, 10:30-11:00 am. 10% additional purchase applicable.
data.description: During the upcoming auction between 10:30 am and 11:00 am, the Government Debt Management will auction Treasury bonds of the Series, with specific ISIN numbers and Maturity Dates as outlined in the table. Payments for these bonds are required to be received by the Central Bank by 14:00 on the Settlement Date. The Bonds will be delivered electronically on the same day. Eligibility for purchasing an additional 10% is subject to Article 6 of the General Terms of Auction for Treasury bonds.
